calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-13-2021 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, been assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Ahmad Fawad, an individual.
Dept: 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:46 a.m.

Henry Yandell, Esq. appeared for plaintiff American Express National Bank, Successor by Merger to American Express Bank, FSB.
Raquel Hernandez, Assistant Custodian of Records for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Mr. Yandell and Ms. Hernandez appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Ahmad Fawad, an individual.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Common Counts was filed on October 26, 2020.
Defendant Ahmad Fawad's answer to plaintiff's complaint was filed on November 24, 2020.
Notice of Time & Place of Trial was served on June 4, 2021, setting trial for October 4, 2021. Matter was assigned to Department 514 for a Short Cause Trial/Prove-Up hearing on October 18, 2021, and continued to today, December 13, 2021.
Plaintiff's Trial Brief, Exhibit List and Witness List were filed on September 27, 2021.
DOE defendants were dismissed September 27, 2021.

Plaintiff American Express National Bank, Successor by Merger to American Express Bank, FSB, submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Card Member Agreement......................................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 2: Copies of Monthly Credit Card Statements...................................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff American Express National Bank, Successor by Merger to American Express Bank, FSB, and against defendant Ahmad Fawad, an individual, as follows:

Principal/Damages - $13,470.21.
Prejudgment Interest - Waived.
Attorney Fees - Waived.
Costs - $459.35.
Total - $13,929.50.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review signature.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits.

Proceedings concluded at 10:58 a.m.

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-15-2021 Continued To Dec-13-21 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 514

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-04-2021 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-04-2021 Set For Trial On Oct-04-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
